Effect: Twist Reason.name: 效果：扭曲理性 Effect: Twist Reason
Effect: Twist Reason.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.ne1PdopyXUh9LPfx]{Twist Reason} 授予

根据结果，你在一次或多次攻击掷骰、AC、强韧豁免、反射豁免、意志豁免或察觉上承受环境减值。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.ne1PdopyXUh9LPfx]{Twist Reason}

You take a circumstance penalty to one or more of attack rolls, AC, Fortitude saving throws, Reflex saving throws, Will saving throws, or Perception, depending on the outcome.

Aura: Aura of Righteousness.name: 灵光：正义灵光 Aura: Aura of Righteousness
Aura: Aura of Righteousness.description:
你与20尺内所有盟友在对抗邪魔与亡灵时，其攻击掷骰、伤害掷骰、豁免与AC获得+2状态加值。

You and all allies within 20 feet gain a +2 status bonus to attack rolls, damage rolls, saving throws, and AC against fiends and undead.

Effect: Safe Within the Nest.name: 效果：巢穴内的安全 Effect: Safe Within the Nest
Effect: Safe Within the Nest.description:
你获得等于你等级一半的弱点，针对区域伤害和溅射伤害。

You gain weakness equal to half your level against area damage and splash damage.

Effect: Watching Swarm.name: 效果：监视蜂群 Effect: Watching Swarm
Effect: Watching Swarm.description:
你获得全向视觉。

You gain all-around vision.

Effect: Power Nap.name: 效果：强力小憩 Effect: Power Nap
Effect: Power Nap.description:
你获得等于你等级的临时生命值。

You gain temporary Hit Points equal to your level.

Effect: Adamantine Claws.name: 效果：精金利爪 Effect: Adamantine Claws
Effect: Adamantine Claws.description:
你从斯芬克斯族裔获得的徒手攻击被视为精金。

Your unarmed attacks gained from the sphinx ancestry are treated as adamantine.

Aura: Aura of Vitality.name: 灵光：活力灵光 Aura: Aura of Vitality
Aura: Aura of Vitality.description:
你和你光环中的盟友获得对所有豁免的+1状态加值，以及等同于你等级的对正能量与负能量伤害的抗力。

You and allies in your aura gain a +1 status bonus to all saving throws and resistance equal to your level to positive and negative damage.

Effect: Elemental Strike (Frost Giant).name: 效果：元素打击（霜巨人） Effect: Elemental Strike (Frost Giant)
Effect: Elemental Strike (Frost Giant).description:
你的速度受到-15英尺的状态减值。

You take a –15-foot status penalty to your Speeds.

Effect: Lunging Strike.name: 效果：突刺打击 Effect: Lunging Strike
Effect: Lunging Strike.description:
你的AC承受–1环境减值。

You take a –1 circumstance penalty to AC.

Effect: Look Both Ways.name: 效果：左右看看 Effect: Look Both Ways
Effect: Look Both Ways.description:
你获得全方位视觉，令你无法被夹击。

You gain all-around vision, preventing you from being flanked.

Effect: Bolster Wings.name: 效果：强化双翼 Effect: Bolster Wings
Effect: Bolster Wings.description:
你获得等同于你陆地速度的飞行速度。

You gain a fly Speed equal to your land Speed.

Effect: Hillblood.name: 效果：丘陵血统 Effect: Hillblood
Effect: Hillblood.description:
你获得等同于你等级的临时生命值。

You gain temporary hit points equal to your level.

Effect: Embrace of Home.name: 效果：家园的拥抱 Effect: Embrace of Home
Effect: Embrace of Home.description:
你获得等同于你等级的临时生命值。

You gain temporary Hit Points equal to your level.

Effect: Envenom Bite.name: 效果：毒液撕咬 Effect: Envenom Bite
Effect: Envenom Bite.description:
你的打击造成额外的1d6毒素伤害。在第10等级时，此毒素伤害提高至2d6，而在第18等级时，该毒素伤害提高至3d6。

Your strikes trike deal an additional 1d6 poison damage. At 10th level, this poison damage increases to 2d6, and at 18th level, the poison damage increases to 3d6.

Effect: Get Big!.name: 效果：变大！ Effect: Get Big!
Effect: Get Big!.description:
你变为超巨型体型。你的装备随你一同变大，但若被移除或丢弃，则会恢复为正常体型。你的触及从5尺增加至10尺，并且你在进行近战打击的伤害掷骰时获得+2状态加值，且在恐吓检定上获得+2状态加值。

You grow to size Huge. Your equipment grows with you, but it returns to natural size if removed or dropped. Your reach increases from 5 feet to 10 feet, and you gain a +2 status bonus to damage rolls with melee Strikes and a +2 status bonus to Intimidation checks.

Effect: Sword of Flames.name: 效果：烈焰之剑 Effect: Sword of Flames
Effect: Sword of Flames.description:
你持握的任意武器获得 flaming 属性符文的效果，持续 1 分钟或直到你不再持握该武器为止。若这会使武器的属性符文数量超过其正常上限，则其中一个已有的属性符文（由你选择）会被压制，直到该法术结束。

特殊 如果你是 balisse，且你正在与一个生物战斗，并且在战斗开始前你或你的盟友已真诚地给予该生物就某项特定罪行赎罪与悔改的机会，而该生物拒绝，那么该专长改为使你获得 greater flaming 属性符文的效果。如果你是 movanic deva，则你改为在对抗不死生物与对未出生灵魂构成威胁的生物时获得该项增益。

Any weapon you hold gains the effects of the flaming property rune for 1 minute or until you cease holding the weapon. If this would give a weapon more property runes than its normal maximum, one of the existing property runes (you choose) is suppressed until the spell ends.

Special If you're a balisse and you're in combat with a creature that you or your allies have given a good-faith opportunity to atone and repent for a specific crime before combat began, and the creature has refused, then this feat grants you the effects of a greater flaming property rune instead. If you're a movanic deva, you gain this benefit instead against undead and creatures presenting a threat to unborn souls.

Spell Effect: Enlarge.name: 法术效果：变大 Spell Effect: Enlarge
Spell Effect: Enlarge.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wzctak6BxOW8xvFV]{Enlarge} 赋予

在魔法力量的支撑下，目标的体型增长至大型。其装备也随之变大，但若被移除则会恢复为自然体型。该生物变得笨拙 1。其触及增加 5 英尺（若其起始为超小型，则增加 10 英尺），并获得近战伤害 +2 状态加值。该法术对大型或更大的生物没有效果。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wzctak6BxOW8xvFV]{Enlarge}

Bolstered by magical power, the target grows to size Large. Its equipment grows with it but returns to natural size if removed. The creature is clumsy 1. Its reach increases by 5 feet (or by 10 feet if it started out Tiny), and it gains a +2 status bonus to melee damage. This spell has no effect on a Large or larger creature.

Effect: Undersign Embedded Clause (Self).name: 效果：下划线签名嵌入从句（自身） Effect: Undersign Embedded Clause (Self)
Effect: Undersign Embedded Clause (Self).description:
你获得以下之一：

  • AC获得+1状态加值。
  • 攻击和伤害掷骰获得+1状态加值。

You gains one of the following:

  • A +1 status bonus to AC.
  • A +1 status bonus to attack and damage rolls.

Effect: Unfallen.name: 效果：未堕落 Effect: Unfallen
Effect: Unfallen.description:
如果你为中型或更小体型，你变为大型，且你的触及增加5尺（或者如果你不知为何起始为超小体型，则增加10尺）。你必须拥有可供扩张进入的空间，否则该效果失效。你还获得以下增益：

  • 40点临时生命值。
  • 等同于你速度的飞行速度。
  • 对抗魔法的豁免获得+1状态加值。
  • 黑暗视觉。
  • 你的拳头攻击造成2d8伤害。
  • 你的徒手攻击以及你的武器额外造成1点善良伤害。

If you were Medium or smaller, you become Large and your reach increases by 5 feet (or by 10 feet if you somehow started out Tiny). You must have space to expand into, or the effect is lost. You also gain the following benefits:

  • 40 temporary Hit Points.
  • A fly Speed equal to your Speed.
  • A +1 status bonus to saves against magic.
  • Darkvision.
  • Your fist attacks deal 2d8 damage.
  • Your unarmed attacks, and your weapons deal 1 additional good damage.

Effect: Terrifying Aura.name: 效果：骇人灵光 Effect: Terrifying Aura
Effect: Terrifying Aura.description:
你释放出全部潜能，利用你那不祥的存在感恐吓周围的人。持续1分钟，接近你20尺以内的生物必须尝试进行一次 @Check[type:will|against:class-spell] 豁免，DC等于你的职业DC或法术DC中较高者。无论豁免结果如何，它们都会在1分钟内暂时免疫你的恐惧灵光。邪魔免疫你的恐惧灵光。

大成功或大失败 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐惧 1}。

失败 该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐惧 2}。

大成功或大失败 该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐惧 4}。

You unleash your full potential, leveraging your ominous presence to terrify those around you. For 1 minute, creatures that approach within 20 feet of you must attempt a @Check[type:will|against:class-spell] save against a DC equal to the higher of your class DC or spell DC. Regardless of the result of the saving throw, they are temporarily immune to your Terrifying Aura for 1 minute. Fiends are immune to your Terrifying Aura.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}.

Critical Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 4}.

Effect: Accursed Growth.name: 效果：受诅生长 Effect: Accursed Growth
Effect: Accursed Growth.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wzctak6BxOW8xvFV]{Enlarge} 授予

你的体型变为大型，且笨拙 1。你的触及增加 5 尺（若你起始为超小型则增加 10 尺），并且你获得 +2 状态加值于近战伤害。

升阶（4环） 你的体型变为巨型。对近战伤害的状态加值为 +4，且你的触及增加 10 尺（若你起始为超小型则增加 15 尺）。

升阶（6环） 选择本法术的 2 环或 4 环版本之一。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wzctak6BxOW8xvFV]{Enlarge}

You grow to size Large and are clumsy 1. Your reach increases by 5 feet (or by 10 feet if you started out Tiny), and you gain a +2 status bonus to melee damage.

Heightened (4th) You grow to size Huge. The status bonus to melee damage is +4 and your reach increases by 10 feet (or 15 feet if you started out Tiny).

Heightened (6th) Choose either the 2nd-rank or 4th-rank version of this spell.

Effect: Lunar Growth.name: 效果：月之生长 Effect: Lunar Growth
Effect: Lunar Growth.description:
你使用变化形态进入你的混合形态，但你的混合形态为超大型，而非其正常体型，并获得4环 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wzctak6BxOW8xvFV]{Enlarge} 持续1分钟的效果，但你拥有10尺触及而非15尺触及。若你拥有兽性触及专长，则你在超大型形态下的触及改为15尺。

You Change Shape to enter your hybrid form, but your hybrid form is Huge, instead of its normal size, with the effects of a 4th-rank @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wzctak6BxOW8xvFV]{Enlarge} for 1 minute, except that you have 10 feet of reach instead of 15 feet of reach. If you have the Bestial Reach feat, your reach in your Huge form is 15 feet instead.

Effect: Unfallen (Remaster).name: 效果：不坠者（重制版） Effect: Unfallen (Remaster)
Effect: Unfallen (Remaster).description:
如果你是中型或更小体型，你变为大型，且你的触及增加5尺（如果你不知为何一开始是超小体型，则增加10尺）。你必须有可供扩张进入的空间，否则该效果失效。你还获得以下益处：

  • 40 临时生命值。
  • 等同于你速度的飞行速度。
  • 对抗魔法的豁免获得+1 状态加值。
  • 黑暗视觉。
  • 你的拳击攻击造成2d8 伤害。
  • 你的武器与徒手打击获得圣洁（特征）特征。

If you were Medium or smaller, you become Large and your reach increases by 5 feet (or by 10 feet if you somehow started out Tiny). You must have space to expand into, or the effect is lost. You also gain the following benefits:

  • 40 temporary Hit Points.
  • A fly Speed equal to your Speed.
  • A +1 status bonus to saves against magic.
  • Darkvision.
  • Your fist attacks deal 2d8 damage.
  • Your weapon and unarmed Strikes gain the holy trait.

Effect: Look Every Way.name: 效果：环顾四方 Effect: Look Every Way
Effect: Look Every Way.description:
你不会被此效果起源的等级或更低等级的生物夹击。

You can't be flanked by creatures of the origin of this effect's level or lower.

Effect: Absorb Lightning.name: 效果：吸收闪电 Effect: Absorb Lightning
Effect: Absorb Lightning.description:
你获得等于1加上你等級一半的电击伤害抗力。你可以使用@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.vtJOsFvpJmZxwMPs]{Throw Lightning}动作。

You gain resistance to electricity damage equal to 1 plus half your level. You can use the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-actions.Item.vtJOsFvpJmZxwMPs]{Throw Lightning} action.

Effect: Gird Spirit.name: 效果：束缚灵魂 Effect: Gird Spirit
Effect: Gird Spirit.description:
你获得等同于你等级两倍的临时生命值。

You gain temporary Hit Points equal to twice your level.

Effect: Flight of the Sphinx.name: 效果：斯芬克斯的飞行 Effect: Flight of the Sphinx
Effect: Flight of the Sphinx.description:
你获得等同于你陆地速度的飞行速度。

You gain a fly Speed equal to your land Speed.

Effect: True Spirit Touch.name: 效果：真灵接触 Effect: True Spirit Touch
Effect: True Spirit Touch.description:
你的武器和徒手攻击造成的物理伤害对活体生物改为虚无伤害，对亡灵改为活力伤害。

特殊 如果你正在使用宿命之指徒手攻击（其已造成负能量或正能量伤害），你的宿命之指的骰子体型从 1d4 增加到 1d8。若你拥有 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.IxYhGVAVX7AFJ8rH]{Improved Spirit Touch} 专长，则在真灵接触的效果期间，你的强化灵体接触所赋予的额外伤害提高为每个武器伤害骰 1 点伤害。

The physical damage from your weapons and unarmed attacks changes to void damage against living creatures and vitality damage against undead.

Special If you are using a fated finger unarmed attack, which already deals negative or positive damage, the die size of your fated finger increases from 1d4 to 1d8. If you have the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.IxYhGVAVX7AFJ8rH]{Improved Spirit Touch} feat, the additional damage granted by your Improved Spirit Touch increases to 1 damage per weapon damage die during the effects of True Spirit Touch.

Effect: Wreath in Flames.name: 效果：烈焰环绕 Effect: Wreath in Flames
Effect: Wreath in Flames.description:
你当前正持用的一把武器缠绕着火焰，并且你每个武器伤害骰额外造成 1d4 点火焰伤害。

One weapon you're currently wielding is wreathed in flame, and you deal an additional 1d4 fire damage per weapon damage die.

Effect: Enveloping Chains.name: 效果：包覆锁链 Effect: Enveloping Chains
Effect: Enveloping Chains.description:
你在所有速度上承受-10环境减值。

You take a -10 circumstance penalty to all speeds.

Effect: Curse of Pacifism.name: 效果：和平主义诅咒 Effect: Curse of Pacifism
Effect: Curse of Pacifism.description:
你在攻击掷骰上承受–1状态减值。

You take a –1 status penalty to attack rolls.

Effect: Ensnare.name: 效果：诱捕 Effect: Ensnare
Effect: Ensnare.description:
该生物的各项速度受到 –10 尺减值。

The creature takes a –10-foot penalty to its Speeds.

Effect: Winged Eye.name: 效果：翼眼 Effect: Winged Eye
Effect: Winged Eye.description:
你获得等同于你陆地速度的飞行速度。

You gain a fly Speed equal to your land Speed.

Effect: Ride the Winds.name: 效果：乘风而行 Effect: Ride the Winds
Effect: Ride the Winds.description:
你可以勉力从背后唤出羽翼或云翼。一旦显现，这些翅膀会持续 10 分钟。在你显现翅膀期间，你获得等同于你陆地速度的飞行速度。

You can strain to call forth feathered or cloudy wings from your back. Once manifested, these wings remain for 10 minutes. You gain a fly Speed equal to your land Speed while you've manifested your wings.

Effect: Vigilant Watching.name: 效果：警觉守望 Effect: Vigilant Watching
Effect: Vigilant Watching.description:
你的等级或更低等级的生物无法夹击你。

You cannot be flanked by creatures of your level or lower.

Effect: Ire's Blade.name: 效果：艾尔的刀刃 Effect: Ire's Blade
Effect: Ire's Blade.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.dhWLI318WnUNbEKj]{Ire's Blade} 授予

你的打击每拥有一个武器伤害骰，就额外造成 1d6 点精神伤害。此外，你所有需要至少两个动作来施放且使用法术攻击掷骰造成伤害的戏法，每个法术环阶额外造成 1 点精神伤害。这不适用于灵能者职业的增幅戏法或其他非标准戏法。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.dhWLI318WnUNbEKj]{Ire's Blade}

Your Strikes deal 1d6 additional mental damage for each weapon damage die they have. Additionally, all your cantrips that take at least two actions to cast and use spell attack rolls to deal damage deal 1 additional mental damage per spell rank. This doesn't apply to amped cantrips from the psychic class or other nonstandard cantrips.

Effect: Lion's Majesty.name: 效果：狮之威仪 Effect: Lion's Majesty
Effect: Lion's Majesty.description:
你获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wzctak6BxOW8xvFV]{Enlarge}的效果。

You gain the effects of @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.Item.wzctak6BxOW8xvFV]{Enlarge}.

Effect: Curse of Beguiling.name: 效果：诱惑诅咒 Effect: Curse of Beguiling
Effect: Curse of Beguiling.description:
你对被标记的目标进行攻击掷骰时承受–1状态减值。

You take a –1 status penalty to attack rolls against the marked target.

Effect: Aura of Vitality.name: 效果：活力灵光 Effect: Aura of Vitality
Effect: Aura of Vitality.description:
你获得对所有豁免检定的+1状态加值，并获得对正能量与负能量伤害的抗力。

You gain a +1 status bonus to all saving throws and resistance to positive and negative damage.

Effect: Fateful Arrow.name: 效果：命运之箭 Effect: Fateful Arrow
Effect: Fateful Arrow.description:
你在对抗灵魂引渡者的法术，或来自灵魂引渡者族裔或来世代理人变体的能力时进行的豁免检定上承受状态减值。

You take a status penalty on saving throws against the spells of psychopomps or abilities from the psychopomp ancestry or agent of the afterlife archetype.

Effect: Infuse Weapon.name: 效果：灌注武器 Effect: Infuse Weapon
Effect: Infuse Weapon.description:
你当前正在挥舞的武器变为魔法，并暂时转化为下列特殊材料之一：银或冷铁。在11级时，将精金和桃木加入你可选择的特殊材料列表。

The weapon you’re currently wielding becomes magical and temporarily transforms into one of the following special materials: silver or cold iron. At 11th level, add adamantine and peachwood to the list of special materials you can select.

Aura: Harmonizing Aura.name: 灵光：调和灵光 Aura: Harmonizing Aura
Aura: Harmonizing Aura.description:
你与区域内的盟友在造成音波伤害的效果的伤害掷骰上获得+3状态加值，并在对抗音波与听觉效果时获得+1状态加值至AC与所有豁免。区域内的敌人在音波伤害掷骰上承受–3状态减值，并在对抗音波与听觉效果时承受–1状态减值至AC与所有豁免。

You and allies in the area gain a +3 status bonus to damage rolls for effects dealing sonic damage and a +1 status bonus to AC and all saves against sonic and auditory effects. Enemies in the area take a –3 status penalty to sonic damage rolls and a –1 status penalty to AC and all saves against sonic and auditory effects.

Effect: Sunder Objects.name: 效果：破坏物体 Effect: Sunder Objects
Effect: Sunder Objects.description:
用于 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.ANwKEz3DXUjpvxBq]{Sunder Objects} 的短暂效果

你的硬度降低 5。

Ephemeral effect for @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.ANwKEz3DXUjpvxBq]{Sunder Objects}

Your hardness is reduced by 5.

Effect: Swarmshield.name: 效果：蜂群护盾 Effect: Swarmshield
Effect: Swarmshield.description:
你获得对你的AC的+1环境加值。

You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to your AC.

Effect: Living Statue.name: 效果：活体雕像 Effect: Living Statue
Effect: Living Statue.description:
当你处于石质斯芬克斯形态时，你获得AC+2状态加值以及对物理伤害的抗力10（精金除外），但你的速度也会受到–10英尺的减值。

特殊 若你拥有精金利爪专长，则在活体雕像效果持续期间，你的徒手攻击被视为精金。

While in your stone sphinx form, you gain a +2 status bonus to AC and resistance 10 to physical damage (except adamantine), but you also take a –10-foot penalty to your Speeds.

Special If you have the Adamantine Claws feat, your unarmed attacks are treated as adamantine for as long as Living Statue's effect lasts.

Effect: Diabolic Wounds.name: 效果：恶魔伤口 Effect: Diabolic Wounds
Effect: Diabolic Wounds.description:
从持续性伤害中恢复所进行的纯骰检定的DC从15提高到17

The DC of flat checks to recover from persistent damage is increased from 15 to 17

Effect: Purging Flame.name: 效果：净化之焰 Effect: Purging Flame
Effect: Purging Flame.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.sZTFAyzaiybk0ChL]{净化之焰} 授予

你失去树皮之肤族裔能力。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.sZTFAyzaiybk0ChL]{Purging Flame}

You lose the skin of bark ancestry ability.

Effect: Moonlight Gift.name: 效果：月光赋礼 Effect: Moonlight Gift
Effect: Moonlight Gift.description:
你获得狼人形态的混合形态的徒手打击。你也获得等同于你等级一半的银制弱点，并且以混合形态进行徒手攻击的攻击与伤害掷骰获得+1状态加值。

You gain the unarmed strikes of the werecreature's hybrid form. You also gain weakness equal to half your level to silver and a +1 status bonus to attack and damage rolls with the hybrid form unarmed attacks.

Effect: Raise Wings.name: 效果：扬翼 Effect: Raise Wings
Effect: Raise Wings.description:
当你的翅膀抬起时，你获得对AC的+1环境加值。你可以使用一个互动动作抓住你的翅膀以支撑它。这会占用你的一只手，使其不再空闲也无法持握任何其他物品，但这稳固的支撑会将对AC的环境加值从+1提高到+2。

While your wings are raised, you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to AC. You can use an Interact action to take a hold of your wing to brace it. This uses one of your hands, which is no longer free or able to hold anything else, but the sturdy bracing increases the circumstance bonus to AC from +1 to +2.

Effect: Acidic Sap.name: 效果：酸性树液 Effect: Acidic Sap
Effect: Acidic Sap.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.pl8NFzEnzaayBvDI]{酸性树液} 赋予

你的速度受到–5英尺的环境减值。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.pl8NFzEnzaayBvDI]{Acidic Sap}

You take a –5-foot circumstance penalty to your Speeds.

Effect: Apex Predator.name: 效果：顶级掠食者 Effect: Apex Predator
Effect: Apex Predator.description:
你获得等同于你等级的临时生命值、你的速度获得+10英尺状态加值，以及你的强韧与反射豁免获得+2状态加值。此外，你处于@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{加速}状态。

You gain temporary Hit Points equal to your level, a +10-foot status bonus to your Speed, and a +2 status bonus to your Fortitude and Reflex saving throws. In addition, you are @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened}.

Effect: On Heavenly Wings.name: 效果：于天堂之翼上 Effect: On Heavenly Wings
Effect: On Heavenly Wings.description:
你获得等同于你速度的飞行速度。如果你拥有 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.Ok8cFvXZ9HFCMYep]{重返天界}，你获得对你的飞行速度的 +20 状态加值。

You gain a fly Speed equal to your Speed. If you have @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.Ok8cFvXZ9HFCMYep]{Return to the Heavens} you gain a +20 status bonus to your fly speed.

Effect: Last Second Repair.name: 效果：最后一秒修理 Effect: Last Second Repair
Effect: Last Second Repair.description:
你获得等同于紧急修理通常会恢复的生命值数量的临时生命值。

You gain temporary Hit Points equal to the amount of Hit Points Emergency Repair would normally recover.

Effect: Aura of Righteousness.name: 效果：正义灵光 Effect: Aura of Righteousness
Effect: Aura of Righteousness.description:
你对邪魔与不死生物的攻击掷骰、伤害掷骰、豁免和AC获得+2状态加值。

You gain a +2 status bonus to attack rolls, damage rolls, saving throws, and AC against fiends and undead.

Effect: Confessor's Aura.name: 效果：忏悔者的灵光 Effect: Confessor's Aura
Effect: Confessor's Aura.description:
由 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.O0md082TnICsA3H6]{忏悔者的灵光} 授予

你在自己周围创造一道忏悔者的灵光。

Granted by @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.O0md082TnICsA3H6]{Confessor's Aura}

You create a confessor's aura around you.

Effect: Frenzy of the Moon.name: 效果：月之狂乱 Effect: Frenzy of the Moon
Effect: Frenzy of the Moon.description:
你在 1 分钟内以你的混合形态的徒手攻击造成的伤害获得 +2 环境加值。若你拥有强效强击的强力重拳缠手带，该伤害的环境加值提高至 +3；若你拥有极效强击的强力重拳缠手带，则提高至 +4。

You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to damage with your hybrid form's unarmed attacks for 1 minute. If you have a greater striking handwraps of mighty blows, this circumstance bonus to damage increases to +3, or to +4 if you have a major striking handwraps of mighty blows.

Effect: Rejuvenating Swarm.name: 效果：复苏虫群 Effect: Rejuvenating Swarm
Effect: Rejuvenating Swarm.description:
你获得再生 15，并且无法执行具有虫群之血特征的动作。

You gain regeneration 15 and cannot take actions with the swarmblood trait.

Aura: Traveler's Aura.name: 灵光：旅者灵光 Aura: Traveler's Aura
Aura: Traveler's Aura.description:
你对该灵光内的生物不处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg] 状态。

You are not @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg] to creatures in this aura.

Effect: Vigorous Regrowth.name: 效果：活力再生长 Effect: Vigorous Regrowth
Effect: Vigorous Regrowth.description:
你获得等同于你等级的再生，被火焰与强酸克服。

You gain regeneration equal to your level, overcome by fire and acid.

Effect: Empathetic Dissonance.name: 效果：共情失谐 Effect: Empathetic Dissonance
Effect: Empathetic Dissonance.description:
用于 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.K6FieL5yfhwf8CTq]{Empathetic Dissonance} 的短暂效果

你的打击伤害受到状态减值。

Epheneral effect for @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.K6FieL5yfhwf8CTq]{Empathetic Dissonance}

You take a status penalty to strike damage.

Effect: Hunger.name: 效果：饥饿 Effect: Hunger
Effect: Hunger.description:
由于你的潜意识把有感知的生物视为食物，你的交涉检定受到–2环境减值，其他需要耐心或长时间行动的技能检定也受到–2环境减值。

You receive a –2 circumstance penalty to Diplomacy checks due to the way your subconscious looks on the sapient creature as food, and a –2 circumstance penalty to other skill checks requiring patience or a lengthy activity.

Effect: Harmonizing Aura (Allies).name: 效果：和谐灵光（盟友） Effect: Harmonizing Aura (Allies)
Effect: Harmonizing Aura (Allies).description:
你和区域内的盟友在造成音波伤害的效果的伤害掷骰上获得+3状态加值，并且在对抗音波与听觉效果时的AC与所有豁免上获得+1状态加值。

You and allies in the area gain a +3 status bonus to damage rolls for effects dealing sonic damage and a +1 status bonus to AC and all saves against sonic and auditory effects.

Effect: Wanderer's Ward.name: 效果：流浪者的守护 Effect: Wanderer's Ward
Effect: Wanderer's Ward.description:
你获得+2环境加值，适用于对抗环境危害的AC与豁免。

You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to AC and saves against environmental hazards.

Effect: Call on Golem Antimagic.name: 效果：召唤魔像反魔法 Effect: Call on Golem Antimagic
Effect: Call on Golem Antimagic.description:
你在对抗触发的魔法效果与所有其他来自触发生物的魔法效果时，你的豁免和AC获得+1环境加值。

You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to your saving throws and AC against the triggering magical effect and all other magical effects from the triggering creature.

Effect: Spiritual Warden.name: 效果：灵性守卫 Effect: Spiritual Warden
Effect: Spiritual Warden.description:
你获得对抗死亡效果以及以其灵魂为目标或操控其灵魂的效果的豁免+2状态加值，并获得等同于你的等级的抗力以抵御来自此类效果的伤害。

You gain a +2 status bonus to saving throws against death effects and effects that target or manipulate their souls and gain resistance equal to your level to damage from such effects.

Effect: Curse of Rooting.name: 效果：扎根诅咒 Effect: Curse of Rooting
Effect: Curse of Rooting.description:
你的各项速度承受–15英尺的环境减值。

You take a –15-foot circumstance penalty to your Speeds.

Effect: Undersign Embedded Clause (Count.name: 效果：下划线嵌入式条款（对手方） Effect: Undersign Embedded Clause (Counterparty)
Effect: Undersign Embedded Clause (Count.description:
对手获得以下之一：

  • AC获得+1状态加值。
  • 攻击和伤害掷骰获得+1状态加值。

The counterparty gains one of the following:

  • A +1 status bonus to AC.
  • A +1 status bonus to attack and damage rolls.

Effect: Oculus Strike.name: 效果：眼魔打击 Effect: Oculus Strike
Effect: Oculus Strike.description:
你下一次进行攻击掷骰时，将该次攻击掷骰掷两次并使用较好的结果。该次攻击无视对攻击掷骰的环境减值。

The next time you make an attack roll, roll the attack twice and use the better result. The attack ignores circumstance penalties to the attack roll.

Effect: Wrappings Lash.name: 效果：裹缠鞭挞 Effect: Wrappings Lash
Effect: Wrappings Lash.description:
你在成功时对触发动作承受 –1 环境减值（大成功或大失败时为 –2）。

You take a –1 circumstance penalty to the triggering action on a success (–2 on a critical success).

Effect: Fully Satisfied.name: 效果：完全满足 Effect: Fully Satisfied

Effect: Strengthened Wings.name: 效果：强化之翼 Effect: Strengthened Wings
Effect: Strengthened Wings.description:
你获得等同于你速度的飞行速度。

You gain a fly Speed equal to your Speed.

Aura: Spiritual Warden.name: 灵光：灵性守卫者 Aura: Spiritual Warden
Aura: Spiritual Warden.description:
你和处于你灵光中的盟友获得+2状态加值，用于对抗死亡效果以及以他们的灵魂为目标或操控其灵魂的效果的豁免，并获得等同于你等级的抗力，用于减少此类效果造成的伤害。

You and allies in your aura gain a +2 status bonus to saving throws against death effects and effects that target or manipulate their souls and gain resistance equal to your level to damage from such effects.

Effect: Calming Presence.name: 效果：镇静威仪 Effect: Calming Presence
Effect: Calming Presence.description:
你的攻击掷骰与DC承受–1状态减值。

You take a –1 status penalty to your attack rolls and DCs.

Effect: Beserk.name: 效果：狂暴 Effect: Beserk
Effect: Beserk.description:
你的近战打击造成额外2点伤害，但你的AC承受–1减值，且你无法使用带有专注（特征）的动作。

you deal 2 additional damage with melee Strikes, but you take a –1 penalty to your AC and can't use actions with the concentrate trait.

Effect: Scheming Trick.name: 效果：阴谋诡计 Effect: Scheming Trick
Effect: Scheming Trick.description:
你对起源进行攻击掷骰时承受–4环境减值。一些效果会将此减值扩展到豁免、AC、技能或察觉检定。

You take a –4 circumstance penalty attack rolls against the oprigin. Some effects expand this penalty to saving throws, AC, skill, or Perception checks.

Effect: False Moon.name: 效果：虚假之月 Effect: False Moon
Effect: False Moon.description:
你获得处于满月月光下的益处。你的银过敏所造成的弱点从你等级的一半提升为你的等级（若你拥有@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.B9uMuAsKbkHXQNC9]{Inured to Silver}专长，则改为恢复为你等级的一半）。

You gain the benefits of being under the light of a full moon. The weakness from your silver allergy increases from half your level to your level (or returns to half your level if you have the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-feats.Item.B9uMuAsKbkHXQNC9]{Inured to Silver} feat).

Effect: Harmonizing Aura (Enemies).name: 效果：和谐光环（敌人） Effect: Harmonizing Aura (Enemies)
Effect: Harmonizing Aura (Enemies).description:
你在音波伤害掷骰上承受–3状态减值，并在对抗音波与听觉效果时的AC与所有豁免上承受–1状态减值。

You take a –3 status penalty to sonic damage rolls and a –1 status penalty to AC and all saves against sonic and auditory effects.
